title: [Planche 28] Green-house
currentLocation: Réserve Edmond de Rothschild / Grotesque Architecture, or, Rural Amusement; consisting of plans, elevations, and sections, for huts, retreats, summer and winter hermitages, terminaries, chinese, gothic, and natural grottos, cascades, baths, mosques, moresque pavilions, grotesque and rustic seats, green houses, &c / L 487 LR / Folio 38 / gravé au recto
